title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Elior India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Elior India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Elior India International Enterprises in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Elior India International Enterprises:
Elior India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Elior India International Enterprises!
